title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary: Add `omitempty` to the `json` tag on `PluginSpec.Config` (line 90) to match the existing `MiddlewareSpec.Config` tag and avoid inconsistent JSON serialization (null vs. omitted) in CRD status diffs.

code_comments.body:
`PluginSpec.Config` is missing the `omitempty` JSON tag that is present on the analogous `MiddlewareSpec.Config` field (line 113). This inconsistency means a `PluginSpec` with a nil `Config` will serialize as `"config": null` in JSON, while a `MiddlewareSpec` will omit the field entirely. This creates a discrepancy that will be visible in CRD status diffs once these types are embedded in S011.

```suggestion
	Config map[string]string `json:"config,omitempty"`
```
code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: Added `omitempty` to the `Config` field's JSON tag in `PluginSpec` (line 90) so that a nil `Config` map is omitted from JSON output, consistent with the analogous `MiddlewareSpec.Config` field.

resolution_summary: Added the missing `omitempty` JSON tag to the `PluginSpec.Config` field to match the existing convention on `MiddlewareSpec.Config`. This ensures consistent JSON serialization behavior where nil maps are omitted rather than serialized as `null`, preventing spurious CRD status diffs when these types are embedded in S011.
